data.description:
Duration: Concentration (up to 1 turn) or instant (see below)

Range: 30’

This spell has three uses:

  1. Ward: By concentrating and remaining stationary, enchanted or undead monsters that come within range may be banished or destroyed. Each monster may make a Mental save to avoid banishment or destruction. If a monster’s save succeeds, it flees the affected area.
  2. Target single monster: Instantly banish or destroy a single enchanted or undead monster within range. The monster may make a Mental save (with a –2 penalty) to avoid banishment or destruction. If the monster’s  save succeeds, it flees the affected area.
  3. Dispel curse: Instantly dispel the hold that a cursed item has over a being within range.
